title: Documentation, Change, Lifecycle, and Monitoring · Incident Case: Net Log Siem Api
summary: Operate a living network source of truth with baselines, telemetry, alerts, configuration, and service ownership. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net log siem api increment in an operations and observability runbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Aggregate syslog and application events, correlate in SIEM, and integrate APIs with time, identity, parsing, retention, and access controls.
Combine flow data, packet capture, interface metrics, and baselines to distinguish conversation, content, and anomaly evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
